replies.msg:
大家平時著中低筒籃球鞋著耐左個腳眼位咪會爆
有人方法可以救得返？

買高筒鞋Air Jordan就沒事！I’m a fan of Vince Carter. He was indeed an exciting slam dunker who was worth his weight in gold to Toronto Raptors. Don’t get me wrong- I still enjoy watching him play even though his prime has passed. He proved his worth to Raptors by helping win multiple championships. His worth to Raptors were incalculable. I must say he’s made fairly quick progress with his three point shooting since he joined Nets. Unfortunately his back injury has progressed fairly rapidly over the last four months forcing him to be sidelined for five weeks because of his back injury. His friend LeBron James will also be out of commission until his leg heals. He’s made steady progress with his shooting since he injured his leg. His doctor 👩🏻‍⚕️ said he was making good progress and will check on his progress next week. He assigned the blame for his leg injury to a lack of stretching and training. Oh well 😔 it could be worse. His worth of contribution to Lakers is incalculable. In my opinion Lakers is as likely to beat Warriors as Cavaliers. The other month Lakers didn’t just beat Bulls. They wiped the floor with them. The responsibilities of every coach in every team are clearly defined. In addition, the government has set up a commission to look at the use of steroids among players. Another commission has been created to examine family violence in NBA which I wholeheartedly support. Besides basketball, I’m also a boxing fan. Floyd is going to fight next March in Vegas. If he tests positive for steroids again the fans will be deeply disappointed in him. The promoter will also be terribly disappointed with him since last year two of his tests came back positive. As a result he was suspended for half a year. However if he loses because of ring rust due to having been suspended for half a year the fans including me will be bitterly disappointed by the result. My brother who’s a boxing fan too will be disappointed at the fact that he loses due to ring rust because of having been suspended. Last year I was a bit disappointed to hear his fight with Oscar was overturned to a no contest. The fans were disappointed to find he would be suspended too.
